fontStack: No prior app font stack at root; ScamShield introduces Geist + IBM Plex Sans + JetBrains Mono tokens.
palette: No prior design tokens at root; ScamShield introduces OKLCH light technical palette.
motion: No prior motion library at root; ScamShield uses CSS transform/opacity only.
spacing: No prior spacing scale at root; ScamShield introduces 4pt semantic spacing tokens.
